title: scrophularia olympica var. rutifolia
intro: Scrophularia olympica var. rutifolia, also known as mountain figwort, is a plant species belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia olympica var. rutifolia are said to include the alleviation of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the treatment of fever and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its roots, leaves, and flowers, and are often consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures.
